news.title: DeepMind Launches Gemini Robotics and Gemini Robotics-ER (March 2025)
news.snippet: The model can adapt to new models of robotic arms, and to new types of tasks. In March 2025, DeepMind launched two AI models, Gemini Robotics and Gemini Robotics-ER, aimed at improving how robots interact with the physical world and released Gemini Robotics 1.5 in September 2025.

tech.title: Machine Learning Tutorial - Neural Nets, Training, Math, Code
tech.snippet: This tutorial covers everything from how networks work and train to the Python code implementation.
